CustomField.formula: 'Rent/Term: ' + Text(round((leaseworks__Lease_Expiry__c-leaseworks__Lease_Start__c)/365,0)) + 'yr@ $' + Text(round(leaseworks__Rent__c/1000,0)) +'k/mo; ' + right('0' + text(month(leaseworks__Lease_Start__c)),2 ) + '/' + right(text(Year(leaseworks__Lease_Start__c)),2 ) + '; ' + 'Total cash flows: $' + Text(round(leaseworks__Total_Cash_Flows__c/1000000,1)) + 'M; ' + ' GAAP Gain/(Loss) on Sale: $' + Text(round(leaseworks__GAAP_Gain_Loss_on_Sale__c/1000000,1)) + 'M; ' + ' Income: $' + Text(round(leaseworks__Income_Statement_Impact__c/1000000,1)) + 'M'
CustomField.label: Value to Hold
